title: Sweet Eastern Chicken Curry
description: A delicious and flavorful curry dish made with tender chicken and a sweet eastern-inspired sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
5. Stir in curry powder and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
6. Add honey, yogurt, and lemon juice to the skillet and stir until smooth.
7. Return chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
9. Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
10. Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
